name: microsoft-azure-devops
title: Microsoft Azure DevOps
description: Integration with Azure DevOps services for developers

commands.name: azure-devops-credentials
commands.title: Credentials DevOps
commands.description: Manage your Azure DevOps credentials securely
commands.subtitle: Add, edit, or remove Azure DevOps credentials

commands.name: azure-devops-search
commands.title: Search DevOps
commands.description: Search for any work item with match description or number
commands.subtitle: Search work items by description or number

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1

author: SMarconetto
